rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no bearing on Educ. Code §45.163, which governs a school board's authority to accept donations and gifts. The two provisions address unrelated subjects.
quote: The board of directors may accept donations, gifts, and endowments to be held and administered as may be required by the respective donors, to the extent that those requirements do not contravene law.
_note: No conflict identified; rule text concerns gift acceptance, not property tax exemptions.
